overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a foggy morning walk along the Saint Denis docks. The player character moves through wooden piers, past steamboats and industrial cargo, with the camera smoothly following at walking pace through the atmospheric harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dock approach to terminal building

events.description: slight turn to navigate around pedestrian carrying sack

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the Saint Denis terminal building

notable_agents.action: dock worker carrying large sack walking toward camera
worker handling cargo near stacked crates

entered.detail: large wooden terminal building with clock tower and SAINT DENIS signage
industrial crane structure with metal framework
weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires
crates and barrels stacked on the dockside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy wooden dock with the Saint Denis terminal building visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past cargo crates and utility poles, approaching the terminal while navigating around dock workers carrying goods.

events.description: turns right at the terminal building revealing waterfront with moored sailboats
moving under the building overhang creates shadow patterns on the dock

agents.ego_description: turning right at the terminal building and proceeding along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing walking ahead along the dock

entered.detail: several wooden sailboats with tall masts moored in the harbor
calm water of the harbor reflecting the boats and sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the terminal building, transitioning from the main dock to a waterfront promenade. Sailboats become visible in the harbor to the left while the terminal building now dominates the right side. The walkway moves under the building's overhang, creating mixed lighting conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under terminal building with benches

events.description: large support beam temporarily blocks view of the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking under the terminal building overhang, passing people resting on benches

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on wooden bench facing the water
woman in period dress sitting on bench

entered.detail: simple wooden benches for dock workers and travelers
white painted wooden support beams of the terminal overhang

segments.scene_description: Moving under the terminal building's overhang, the scene becomes darker with mostly blocked sky. Wooden benches line the walkway where NPCs sit facing the harbor. Support beams create periodic occlusions of the view as the camera progresses along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between steamboat and warehouse

events.description: enters narrow passage between large steamboat and wooden warehouse building
steamboat hull blocks view of the harbor temporarily

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow confined passage between the docked steamboat and warehouse

entered.detail: large grey steamboat with red and white smokestacks docked alongside the pier
weathered wooden warehouse building with porch and support columns

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow enclosed passage between a massive steamboat on the right and a wooden warehouse on the left. The dock becomes more confined with the large vessel's hull dominating the right side of the frame while the warehouse wall lines the left.

events.description: exits narrow passage into open industrial yard with train tracks visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the narrow passage into the open industrial dockyard

notable_agents.action: workers walking near the train tracks in the distance

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the dock
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke in the background

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the scene opens into a wide industrial dockyard. Train tracks run across the ground ahead with factory smokestacks visible in the foggy background. The steamboat now appears on the left side as the camera moves past it into the open yard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial dock that transitions into a sheltered waterfront promenade. It begins by moving forward along a wooden pier, navigating past cargo crates and utility poles toward the distant Saint Denis terminal building while weaving around dock workers. As the camera reaches the terminal, the perspective shifts to the right, moving away from the main dock and opening up to a view of sailboats anchored in the harbor to the left. The scene then glides under the building's overhang, where the open morning fog gives way to mixed lighting conditions as the terminal structure dominates the right side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed shelter of a terminal building into a wide, foggy industrial dockyard. It begins under a dark overhang where wooden benches and support beams periodically obstruct the view of the harbor. As the camera progresses, the space tightens into a narrow passage squeezed between the towering hull of a massive steamboat and the wall of a wooden warehouse. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the corridor, leaving the vessel behind to the left and revealing an expansive yard. Finally, the view expands across ground marked by train tracks toward distant factory smokestacks shrouded in a thick morning mist.
